summary: Day Schedule Dynamic Availability-Based Slots - All Features Working. Tested the completely rewritten TherapistSchedule.js component. Day View now shows Availability Blocks with exact start-end times, dynamically calculated Available Slots based on session duration + buffer time, Booked Sessions with client info and status, and proper No Availability warning for days without availability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Day Schedule component fully tested with dynamic availability-based slots. All features working correctly including Availability Blocks, Available Slots calculation, Booked Sessions display, No Availability warning, Add Availability dialog, Block Time dialog, and mobile responsiveness.

day_view_availability_blocks.notes: Shows exact availability times (09:00 – 17:00) with duration (8h 0m) and delete button

dynamic_available_slots.notes: 5 slots calculated correctly: 09:00-10:00, 10:10-11:10, 11:20-12:20, 12:30-13:30, 16:00-17:00 (60min session + 10min buffer = 70min intervals)

booked_sessions_display.notes: Shows client name (Test Client Alpha), time (19:30 – 20:30), status (completed), and notes

session_duration_buffer_info.notes: Displays 'Session: 60 min' and 'Buffer: 10 min' at top of Day View

no_availability_warning.notes: Thursday shows 'No Availability Set' warning with message 'You haven't set any availability for Thursdays' and Add Availability button

add_availability_dialog.notes: Opens with date info (21/01/2026 Wednesday), Start/End Time inputs, note about applying to all Wednesdays, Cancel and Add Availability buttons

block_time_dialog.notes: Opens with date info, 'Block entire day' checkbox, Start/End Time inputs, Reason field with placeholder, Cancel and Block Time buttons

schedule_appointment_dialog.notes: Opens when clicking available slot, shows Date & Time (21/01/2026 • 09:00 – 10:00), Client dropdown, Notes field, Cancel and Schedule buttons

date_format_dd_mm_yyyy.notes: All dates displayed in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g., 21/01/2026)

navigation_buttons.notes: Previous/Next day buttons, Back to Month button, Jump to Date button all working

mobile_responsiveness.notes: All elements visible and functional on mobile (390x844). Calendar grid, Day View sections, Available Slots in 2-column grid, all buttons accessible

fixed_hourly_grid_removed.notes: Old fixed hourly grid (08:00, 09:00, 10:00...) is REMOVED. Day View now shows dynamic sections based on availability
